description: Plugin-distributed hooks for microsoft-fabric. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable Microsoft Fabric anti-patterns in Fabric-ish files (.py/.ipynb/.sql/.kql/.tmdl/.json/.conf/.md) — (1) spark.ms.autotune.enabled set true (use the Native Execution Engine), (2) 'mirroring is free' with no replicate-vs-query qualifier, (3) V-Order disabled on a gold/Direct-Lake table, (4) 'Direct Lake' written with no mode (on OneLake / on SQL). Set FABRIC_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
